scripts.dev-all: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend,ai "cd frontend-user && npm run dev" "cd backend && node server.js" "cd ai-service && python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"
scripts.dev-user-backend: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend "cd frontend-user && npm run dev" "cd backend && node server.js"
